introSection:
Super Cyclone is a steel roller coaster at Santa's Village AZoosment Park in Dundee, Illinois, USA.

The ride was purchased new and opened on May 13, 2017. It replaced WildCat, which opened in 2014 and closed in 2015.
fullText:
Super Cyclone is a steel roller coaster at Santa's Village AZoosment Park in Dundee, Illinois, USA.

The ride was purchased new and opened on May 13, 2017. It replaced WildCat, which opened in 2014 and closed in 2015.
